  Before opening a bug report, please:
  - Search existing issues to avoid duplicates
  - Confirm the issue reproduces on the latest commit on main
  - Fill out every section; incomplete reports may be closed without further investigation
-->

## Environment

|------------------------|-------------------------------|
| OS / Distribution      | e.g. Arch Linux               |
| Wayland Compositor     | e.g. Hyprland v0.47.0         |
| QuickShell version     | e.g. v0.2.1                   |
| Qt version             | e.g. Qt 6.10.1                |
| GPU / Driver           | e.g. AMD RX 6700 / mesa 24.x  |
| Install method         | AUR / manual build / other    |
